message:
**PatchPulse Digest (2026-04-15)**

1. **[Model Releases]** Google launches a Gemini AI app on Mac _(prio 3, The Verge Tech)_
   <https://www.theverge.com/tech/912638/google-gemini-mac-app>
2. **[General]** Microsoft counters the MacBook Neo with freebies for students _(prio 1, The Verge Tech)_
   <https://www.theverge.com/news/912639/microsoft-counters-the-macbook-neo-with-freebies-for-students>
3. **[General]** Best Buy’s Ultimate Upgrade Sale features deals on dozens of our favorite gadgets _(prio 0, The Verge Tech)_
   <https://www.theverge.com/gadgets/911853/best-buy-ultimate-upgrade-sale-2026-tech-deals-apple>
4. **[General]** Ford’s EV and software chief Doug Field is leaving the company _(prio 0, The Verge Tech)_
   <https://www.theverge.com/transportation/912647/ford-doug-field-leaving-ev-software>
5. **[Safety & Policy]** FTC pushes ad agencies into dropping brand safety rules _(prio 0, The Verge Tech)_
   <https://www.theverge.com/policy/912680/ftc-ad-agency-settlement-trust-safety>
6. **[General]** Ikea’s smart donut lamp is a sweet treat _(prio 0, The Verge Tech)_
   <https://www.theverge.com/tech/911809/ikea-varmblixt-smart-donut-lamp-review-matter-thread>
7. **[General]** Most people still don’t want anything to do with robotaxis _(prio 0, The Verge Tech)_
   <https://www.theverge.com/transportation/912357/robotaxi-poll-ev-intelligence-report-waymo-tesla>
8. **[Safety & Policy]** The Senate is voting to save free IRS Direct File today _(prio 0, The Verge Tech)_
   <https://www.theverge.com/policy/912490/irs-direct-file-senate-vote>
